annunaki.name: The Annunaki
annunaki.description: The great sky council of ancient Mesopotamia, divine arbiters of fate and keepers of the Tablets of Destiny.

heavenly_bureaucracy.name: The Heavenly Bureaucracy
heavenly_bureaucracy.description: The celestial court of the Jade Emperor governs all realms through meticulous administration and divine mandate.

yoruba_orishas.name: The Yoruba Orishas
yoruba_orishas.description: Oduduwa descended from the heavens to create the earth and father the Yoruba people, guided by the living wisdom of the Orishas.

aztec_creators.name: The Aztec Four Principle Creators
aztec_creators.description: The four Tezcatlipocas — Quetzalcoatl, Tezcatlipoca, Huitzilopochtli, and Xipe Totec — sacrificed themselves to birth each successive sun and all life.
